name: 2026-05-21 Political Commentary Corruption Index Worst Ever TH
description:
120th out of 182. That's not news. That's a receipt.

Transparency International scored the Philippines 32 out of 100 on its latest Corruption Perceptions Index. The lowest the country has ever scored. Three straight years of sinking.

Filipinos didn't need a foreign index to know. They feel it at every permit, every queue, every project that was funded but never built.

The world just wrote down what Filipinos already pay for daily.

Ganun kalala.

Transparency International scored the Philippines 32 out of 100 on its latest Corruption Perceptions Index. The lowest the country has ever scored. Three straight years of sinking.

Transparency International 2025 Corruption Perceptions Index (released Feb 2026): Philippines ranked 120th of 182 countries, score 32/100, worst-ever result and third straight year of decline. Reported by Inquirer Global News, Philstar, The Manila Times, BusinessWorld.
